title: Petrification
wikitext:
[[File:Petrification.gif|frame|right|350px|]]

==Summary==
'''Petrification''' is the ability to turn someone or something into stone or other inorganic solid material. Petrification of a target may be partial or full. A sub-category of [[Transmutation]], the target is usually unable to move and may not be considered strictly "alive" anymore, though the ability usually isn't outright lethal and may be reversible. Overlaps with both [[Paralysis Inducement]] and [[Status Effect Inducement]].
